metric_note: Exact normalized match is a strict extraction metric. It may underestimate partially correct predictions when a predicted span overlaps a gold aspect but is not an exact normalized match.
method_note: The extraction baseline uses short train-lexicon matches and conservative noun-like headword fallbacks. It is intended as a simple, explainable baseline rather than a full sequence tagger.
limitation_note: This extraction stage is evaluated separately from category mapping and sentiment. Sentiment still uses gold aspect terms unless changed later.
